content: Hello Dotshowq! It's great to meet you. How can I assist you today?
Your name is Dotshowq. How can I assist you today, Dotshowq?
I want to know about you

I’m Mvendaga Ukor, an AI/LLM engineer with a focus on software engineering and a passion for working with large language models (LLMs). Currently, I’m with the Centre for Integrated Health Programs (CIHP) in Abuja. My interests include developing AI solutions that can effectively support health programs and improve outcomes. If you have any specific questions or topics in mind, feel free to ask!
Thank you! I'm glad you think so. If there's anything specific you'd like to know or discuss, feel free to let me know!
I am looking for someone with those skills to employ in my organization

That sounds great! If you're looking for someone with skills in AI and LLM engineering, I can help provide guidance on what to look for in a candidate or discuss collaboration opportunities. If you have any specific questions or details about the roles you're looking to fill, please share!
